name: pbi-mcp-marketplace
description: Local marketplace hosting the pbi-mcp-ts plugin during development.

plugins.name: pbi-mcp-ts
plugins.description: Power BI semantic-model beta for Claude Code — modeling-only wrapper MCP server, skills, subagents, deterministic Date/relationship/DAX/model gates, live Desktop editing, confirmed measure-intent enforcement, and optional user-owned data dictionary context. Dashboard/report/page/visual/PBIR authoring is unavailable in this beta.
